name: @kortix/agent-tunnel
description: Tunnel relay between cloud AI agents and local machines — server relay, local agent, client SDK, JSON-RPC, HMAC signing

scripts.build: bun build src/agent/cli.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/agent-cli.js --banner='#!/usr/bin/env node' && bun build src/client/cli.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/client-cli.js --banner='#!/usr/bin/env node' && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.chmodSync('dist/agent-cli.js', 0o755); fs.chmodSync('dist/client-cli.js', 0o755);"
